title: Communauté de communes de la Région d'Hallencourt
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Région d'Hallencourt  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1995. It was merged into the new Communauté d'agglomération Baie de Somme in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Région d'Hallencourt  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1995. It was merged into the new Communauté d'agglomération Baie de Somme in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 18 communes:
